title: arctostaphylos nummularia subsp. sensitiva
intro: Arctostaphylos nummularia subsp. sensitiva, also known as sensitive manzanita or bearberry manzanita, is a subspecies of the Arctostaphylos nummularia plant, a type of evergreen shrub native to California and Baja California. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of arbutin and other compounds. The health benefits of Arctostaphylos nummularia subsp. sensitiva include its ability to treat urinary tract infections, diarrhea, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and anti-inflammatory agent. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal preparations to support urinary health and immune function.
